incorrects.description: Student selected 50: read the closest grid line instead of the bar endpoint
Student selected 50, the lower gridline endpoint

params.description: Park bar remains highlighted, endpoint emphasized between 50 and 60.
Park bar remains highlighted. Ghost gridline at 50 pulses to show proximity.

steps.text: The bar doesn't stop at 50. Look where the end of the bar actually is. Is it at a line or between two lines?
The bar goes PAST 50. Look at where it ends. Is it at the 50 line or between the lines?

incorrects.description: Student selected 60: read the higher grid line instead of the bar endpoint
Student selected 60, the upper gridline endpoint

params.description: Park bar remains highlighted, endpoint emphasized between 50 and 60.
Park bar remains highlighted. Ghost gridline at 60 pulses to show the bar ends before it.

steps.text: The bar doesn't reach all the way to 60. Look closely at where the bar ends. It stops between two lines.
The bar does not reach 60. Look at where the bar actually ends. Count from 50.

incorrects.description: Student selected 58: attempted estimation but missed that halfway between 50 and 60 is 55
Student selected 58, a value between the gridlines but not halfway

params.description: Park bar highlighted with gridlines at 50 and 60 emphasized.
Park bar remains highlighted. Ghost gridlines at 50 and 60 pulse to show the interval.

steps.text: You saw the bar is between the lines. When a bar is halfway between two lines, find the middle. What's halfway between 50 and 60?
The bar is between 50 and 60, but where exactly? Half of 10 is 5. Halfway between 50 and 60 is 55.

incorrects.description: Student answered incorrectly. System models the correct answer.

params.description: Visual draws from bar endpoint to axis, highlighting position exactly halfway between 50 and 60, with 55 labeled at midpoint.
Horizontal guideline draws from end of Park bar down to axis at 55. The ghost gridline at 55 glows to confirm position.

steps.text: Let me show you. The Park bar ends between 50 and 60. When a bar is exactly in the middle, that's halfway. Half of 10 is 5, so 50 plus 5 equals 55. The bar shows 55 votes.
Let me show you how to find it. The bar ends between 50 and 60. That means we count by 10s: 50, then halfway to 60 is 55. The bar ends at 55 because it's right in the middle between the two lines.
